THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEVRIES & COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB CO. OF PALO ALTO, WM. SCHWEITZER, OWNER $2,845.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,910.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
